name: Chocolate Indulgence
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Creme de Colorado Cookbook
In a large saucepan, melt chocolate and butter together. Gradually add sugar and flour, stirring constantly with a wire whisk. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form, then gently fold into the chocolate mixture. Pour all but 1 cup of the batter into a buttered 8x8-inch pan. Mix 1 cup sour cream with the reserved batter and spread evenly over top. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes. The center will not look done or set. Allow to cool completely, then cover and refrigerate for 4-6 hours before cutting into squares approximately 1-1/2 inches in size using a hot knife. Individual pieces can be wrapped and stored in the freezer.
